calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Christopher Cole, Esq., apparing for Plaintiff PAUL WONG.
Plaintiff Paul Wong sworn and examined of his own behalf.
No appearance by Defendants ANGEL GONGORA, WILBER GONGORA, PEDRO GONGORA (These 3 defendants file answers and failed to appear for Trial this day.) JESSICA ALCANTARA, EDGAR CALDERON, and MANUEL CHI (These 3 defendants failed to answer, Request for Default as to each of these 3 defendants was entered by the clerk on Nov. 4, 2014).
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff Paul Wong and against all defendants as follows: Judgment for possession of the premises at 307 Capp Street, Apt. 3, San Francisco, CA 94112. Judgment for possession applies to all ccupants of the premises including tenants, subtenants if any and named claimants if any, including but not litited to ANGEL GONGORA, JESSICAL ALCANTARA, EDGAR CALDERON, WILBER GONGORA, PEDRO GONGORA, and MANUES CHI.
The Lease is forfeited.
Judgment if for Paul Wong against defendants Jessica Alcantara, Edgar Calderon, Manuel Chi, Angel Gongora, Wilber Gongora, and Pedro Gongora, jointly and severally as follows:
Damages $9,776.50
Holdover damages $4,000.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $1,306.64
for a Total Judgment of $15,083.14
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Line 1

Judge: Garrett L. Wong; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Paul Wong is present.
Attorney Christopher J Cole, Esq. (415-978-9999), counsel for the plaintiff is present.
No Appearance by defendant

The settlement conference does not take place and is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of NOV-24-2014 remains on calendar.
